scripts.clean:install: rm -rf node_modules admin-dashboard/node_modules customer-web/node_modules staff-mobile/node_modules backend/functions/node_modules admin-dashboard/.next customer-web/.next .next && npm install
scripts.clean:install:fresh: rm -rf node_modules admin-dashboard/node_modules customer-web/node_modules staff-mobile/node_modules backend/functions/node_modules package-lock.json admin-dashboard/.next customer-web/.next .next && npm install
scripts.dev:
node -e "console.log('
  Apps (each serves its own /_next/static — stay on the matching origin):
  customer-web    → http://localhost:3000
  admin-dashboard → http://localhost:3001
  staff-mobile    → http://localhost:3002
')" && npm run dev --prefix customer-web & npm run dev --prefix admin-dashboard & npm run dev --prefix staff-mobile -- --web --port 3002 & wait
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @nausheen/customer-web && npm run build --workspace @nausheen/admin-dashboard
scripts.firebase:release:functions: npm run firebase:build && npm run firebase:deploy:functions
